instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Yusuf Li and your zip code is 91148. You are cautious, insecure, organized. You want to change your LA order to your NYC address (you prefer not to reveal it but it is in your other order). You also want to exchange Bluetooth Speaker to be the cheapest green type. Make sure you mention the two requests at the same time to the agent, but mention the exchange first.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: exchange Bluetooth Speaker to be the cheapest green type
dialogue_state.initial_query: Exchange Bluetooth Speaker for cheapest green option

hints.segment: change LA order to your NYC address
hints.hint: Also, change the LA order to my NYC address (the one on my other order)

hints.segment: prefer not to reveal NYC address but it is in your other order
hints.hint: Please use my NYC address from my other order, I prefer not to share it again

hints.segment: mention the two requests at the same time to the agent
hints.hint: Handle both the exchange and address change together
Please process the exchange request first
